2606.24667.title: DREAM: Dense Retrieval Embeddings via Autoregressive Modeling
2606.24667.paper_summary: Dense retrieval embedding models are a fundamental component of modern retrieval-based AI systems. Most dense retrievers are trained with contrastive objectives, which require labeled positive and negative document pairs that are often costly and difficult to obtain. In this work, we investigate whether the autoregressive next-token prediction objective of a large language model (LLM) can provide supervision for dense retrieval. The intuition is simple: if a document contains information relevant to a query, conditioning on that document should make the target output easier for the LLM to predict. A key challenge is that the next-token prediction loss is computed inside the LLM, while the retriever is a separate embedding model. To address this challenge, we propose DREAM (Dense Retrieval Embeddings via Autoregressive Modeling), which injects retriever-generated query-document similarity scores into selected attention heads of a frozen LLM. During training, these scores determine how much attention each candidate document receives while the LLM predicts the target output. The resulting prediction loss provides gradients for retriever training through the attention mechanism. We evaluate DREAM on retrieval benchmarks BEIR and RTEB using embedding backbones ranging from 0.5B to 3B parameters. DREAM consistently outperforms existing baselines across different model scales. These results demonstrate that DREAM provides a promising approach for training dense retrievers through autoregressive modeling.
2606.24667.paper_summary_zh: 密集檢索嵌入模型是現代基於檢索的人工智慧系統的基本組成部分。大多數密集檢索器是使用對比目標進行訓練的，這需要標記的正負文檔對，而這些文檔對通常成本高且難以獲得。在本研究中，我們探討大型語言模型（LLM）的自回歸下個標記預測目標是否可以為密集檢索提供監督。直覺很簡單：如果一個文檔包含與查詢相關的信息，基於該文檔的條件應該使LLM預測目標輸出變得更容易。一個主要挑戰是，下一個標記的預測損失是在LLM內部計算的，而檢索器是一個單獨的嵌入模型。為了解決這個挑戰，我們提出了DREAM（通過自回歸建模的密集檢索嵌入），該方法將檢索器生成的查詢-文檔相似度分數注入到凍結的LLM的選定注意力頭中。在訓練過程中，這些分數決定了每個候選文檔在LLM預測目標輸出時獲得多少注意力。最終的預測損失通過注意力機制為檢索器訓練提供了梯度。我們在檢索基準BEIR和RTEB上評估DREAM，使用的嵌入骨幹範圍從0.5B到3B參數。DREAM在不同模型規模上始終超越現有基準。這些結果表明，DREAM為通過自回歸建模訓練密集檢索器提供了一種有前景的方法。
2606.24667.author: Yixuan Tang et.al.
